flags.message: Outcome-revealing material appeared in the provisioned snapshot: it states an explicit May 11, 2026 disposition and dissent lineup. I did not use that text as forecast evidence and omitted vote predictions, but it was impossible to unsee and may have biased the prediction.

The July 13, 2026 snapshot contains a final disposition, while event.yaml still has resolved=false and record/context.json labels the cell forward. The snapshot cutoff and event state should be reconciled.

This docket is a modern direct appeal initiated by a statement as to jurisdiction, not a discretionary cert petition. The petition-disposition label set does not expressly distinguish summary affirmance, dismissal, probable jurisdiction, or summary vacatur/remand; I mapped the predicted grant-side vacatur/remand to granted.
